title: Custom Difficulty [BTW Addon]
description: Adds the option to create custom difficulties!
body:
# Custom Difficulty Addon
This addon enables the configuration of custom difficulty settings in Better Than Wolves. Just choose the *Custom* difficulty setting in the world creation menu and hit the configuration button!

Existing worlds are also supported, use the `/customdifficulty` ingame command to configure the custom difficulty for a world - and don't forget to enable it via `/difficulty customdiff:custom`!
